Pricing

Know exactly what's wrong with your DNS.
Before your visitors do.

DNSSnuff runs 72 checks across every layer of your DNS configuration and tells you what to fix, in what order, with a single letter grade. Start free — no card needed.

Monthly Annually Save 17%
Free
$0 / month
 

For developers and solo site owners who need occasional DNS checks.

  • ✓ 3 domain checks per month
  • ✓ All 72 DNS checks
  • ✓ Health Score + letter grade
  • ✓ Fix This First priority stack
  • ✓ Shareable URLs (24-hour expiry)
  • ✗ Report history
  • ✗ PDF export
  • ✗ API access
Run your first check
Most Popular
Pro
$19 / month
 

For freelancers and developers managing client sites on a regular basis.

  • ✓ 25 domain checks per month
  • ✓ All 72 DNS checks
  • ✓ Health Score + letter grade
  • ✓ Fix This First + fix impact scores
  • ✓ Shareable URLs (30-day expiry)
  • ✓ 90-day report history
  • ✓ PDF export + JSON export
  • ✓ Copy-ready DNS record snippets
  • ✗ White-label reports
  • ✗ API access
Start free trial
Agency
$49 / month
 

For web agencies running DNS audits across multiple client accounts.

  • ✓ Unlimited domain checks
  • ✓ All 72 DNS checks
  • ✓ Health Score + letter grade
  • ✓ Fix This First + fix impact scores
  • ✓ Shareable URLs — permanent, never expire
  • ✓ 12-month report history
  • ✓ White-label PDF export (your logo)
  • ✓ JSON + CSV export
  • ✓ REST API + webhooks
  • ✓ Priority check queue
  • ✓ Priority email support

Common questions

What counts as a domain check?

One domain check runs all 72 automated checks against a single root domain (e.g. yourcompany.com). Checking the same domain again counts as a second check.

Do I need an account to run a free check?

No. Free reports run without an account and with no credit card. You only need to sign up if you want report history, monitoring, or to track usage across your 3 free checks.

What happens when a shared report link expires?

Expired links return a 404. The underlying report data is retained in your account. You can generate a new shareable link at any time from your report history.

Can I deliver DNS audit reports directly to clients?

Yes — Agency plan includes white-label PDF export. Reports carry your logo and branding. Clients see your name, not DNSSnuff's. Permanent shareable URLs also carry your branding.

Can I cancel anytime?

Yes. No contracts, no minimums, no cancellation fees. Cancel from your account settings and you won't be charged again. Your data is retained for 90 days after cancellation.

◆ DNSSnuff

72 automated diagnostic checks across DNS health, email authentication, DNSSEC, and blacklists — in plain English. Free reports, always. Pro from $19/month. Agency from $49/month.
